name: ssjs_DynamicDE_CreateDE
script:
<script runat="server">
    Platform.Load("core","1.1.1");
	
    var ListDEName = "dynamicDE_Catalog_V_";
    var configDEName = "dynamicDE_Config_V_";
    var newFieldDEName = "dynamicDE_Fields_V_";
    var folderName = "Valtech";
    
    var newDEList = DataExtension.Init(ListDEName);
    var ConfigDE = DataExtension.Init(configDEName);

    function geraLog(strSource, strLog){
        var logDE = DataExtension.Init("log_SSJS_V_");
        logDE.Rows.Add({Script:strSource, CreatedDate:Now(),Message:strLog});
    }
    
   function createDE(deName, templateName){
        var guid = Platform.Function.GUID();
        var fieldRows = ConfigDE.Rows.Lookup(["template_Name"], [templateName]);
        
        try{        
            var fields = [];
            for (var i = 0; i < (fieldRows.length); i++) {
                fields.push(buildField(fieldRows[i]));
            }
            
            var sendable = ConfigDE.Rows.Lookup(["Template_Name","Field_IsSenderRelationShip"], [templateName, true]);

            if (sendable && sendable.length > 0) {
                var newDEconfig = {
                    "CustomerKey" : guid,
                    "Name" : deName,
                    SendableInfo : {
                        Field : { "Name" : sendable[0].Field_Name, "FieldType" : "Text"},
                        RelatesOn : "Subscriber Key"
                    },
                    "IsTestable": false,
                    "Fields" : fields
                 };                
                
            }else{
                var newDEconfig = {
                    "CustomerKey" : guid,
                    "Name" : deName,
                    "Fields" : fields
                 };
            } 
            DataExtension.Add(newDEconfig);
            return guid;                     
            
        }catch(error){		 
            geraLog("ssjs_DynamicDE_CreateDE - Function createDE", Stringify(error));
       }
    }

   function buildField(element){
        try{
            switch (element.Field_Type) {
                case "Text":
                    var fieldConfig = {
                        "Name" : element.Field_Name,
                        "FieldType": "Text",
                        "MaxLength": element.Field_Length                    
                    }
                    break;
            
                case "Date":
                    var fieldConfig = {
                        "Name": element.Field_Name,
                        "FieldType": "Date", 
                        "Ordinal" : 2,
                        "DefaultValue": element.Field_DefaulfValue
            	    }
                    break;
                
                case "EmailAddress":
                    var fieldConfig = {
                        "Name": element.Field_Name,
                        "FieldType": "EmailAddress",
                        "MaxLength": 254
            	    }
                    break;
    
                case "Phone":
                    var fieldConfig = {
                        "Name": element.Field_Name,
                        "FieldType": "Phone",
                        "MaxLength": element.Field_Length
                    }
                    break;  
                    
                case "Boolean":
                    var fieldConfig = {
                        "Name": element.Field_Name,
                        "FieldType": "Boolean",
                        "DefaultValue": element.Field_DefaulfValue
                    }
                    break;  
    
                case "Number":
                    var fieldConfig = {
                        "Name": element.Field_Name,
                        "FieldType": "Number"                    
                    }
                    break;   
                    
                /*default:
                    var fieldConfig = {
                        "Name" : element.Field_Name,
                        "FieldType": "Text",
                        "MaxLength": 50                    
                    }*/
            }
    
            if (element.IsField_PK){
                fieldConfig.IsPrimaryKey = true;
                fieldConfig.IsRequired = true;
            }
            
            if (element.IsField_Required){
                fieldConfig.IsRequired = true;
            }
        
        return fieldConfig;    
            
        }catch(error){		 
            geraLog("ssjs_DynamicDE_CreateDE - Function buildField", Stringify(error));
       }
    }    
    
	try {
	    geraLog("Dynamic DE Creation", "== Data Extension dynamic creation process started ==");
        var dataRows = newDEList.Rows.Lookup(["Status"],["NEW"]);

        if (dataRows && dataRows.length > 0) {
            for (var i = 0; i < (dataRows.length); i++) {
                var newDEName = dataRows[i].Name;
                var newDETemplate = dataRows[i].template_Name;
                var action = '';
                var custom_Key = '';
                try{
                    geraLog("Dynamic DE Creation", "Creating new DE: " + newDEName);
                    action = "CREATED";
                    custom_Key = createDE(newDEName, newDETemplate);
                }catch (e) {       
                    action = "ERROR";
                    custom_Key = '';
                }

                if(custom_Key != '' && custom_Key != 1){
                    newDEList.Rows.Update({Status: 'CREATED', Customer_Key: custom_Key}, ['Template_Name', 'Name'], [newDETemplate, newDEName]);
                    geraLog("Dynamic DE Creation", "(+) Data Extension (" + newDEName + ")  was created successfully.");
                } else {
                    newDEList.Rows.Update({"Status": "ERROR"}, ["Template_Name", "Name"], [newDETemplate, newDEName]);
                    geraLog("Dynamic DE Creation", "(!) Data Extension (" + newDEName + ") was not created.");
                }
                
            }
            geraLog("Dynamic DE Creation", i + " Data Extensions processed.");
        }else{
            geraLog("Dynamic DE Creation", "0 Data Extensions created.");
        }
        
        geraLog("Dynamic DE Creation", "== Data Extension dynamic creation process finished ==");
        
	}catch(error) {		 
		 geraLog("ssjs_DynamicDE_CreateDE", Stringify(error));
	}		

</script>
